chain_id.description: Represents the ID of the chain

input_asset_address.description: Contract address of the asset you want to provide for the swap

output_asset_address.description: Contract address of the asset you want to receive in the swap

input_amount.description: Amount of assets to be exchanged

output_amount.description: Amount of assets you will receive in the exchange

good_until.description: Number of seconds that quotes live. It can also contained a packed representation of the state

destination_address.description: Address will receive the output token

clipper_exchange_address.description: Blade contract address of the pool, is the address used when executing a transaction

calldata.description: Bytes representation of the swap function and parameters to be sent directly to the `clipper_exchange_address` for execution. Only present when `calldata=true` in request.
